title: Large Sample Significance Test Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process for performing a test of significance for large samples (n > 30), including hypothesis formulation, test statistic calculation, and decision making.
elements: Compare Test Statistic to Critical Value
Make Decision: Reject H₀ or Fail to Reject H₀
relationships: Sequential flow from 'State Hypotheses' to 'Draw Conclusion'
The 'Calculate Test Statistic' element uses sample data (x̄, μ, σ, n)
The 'Determine Critical Region' element is informed by the chosen 'Significance Level'
